intro: Neolindleya decipiens, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or Mexican prickly poppy plant, is a flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties.
